ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "categories" TEXT /* Categories the product belongs to */,
  "primary_categories" TEXT /* Primary category of the product */,
  "imageURLs" TEXT /* URL(s) of product images */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* The current price of the product */,
  "stock_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the product is in stock or not */,
  "rating_average" REAL /* The average rating given by customers for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "dateAdded" TEXT /* Date the review was added */,
  "dateUpdated" TEXT /* Date the review was last updated */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the reviewer */,
  "text" TEXT /* Content of the review */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "sourceURLs" TEXT /* URL(s) of the source of the review */,
  "reply_to_review_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the review this review is a reply to */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reviewer has purchased the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review statistic */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review to which these statistics belong */,
  "numHelpful" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given in the review */,
  "subjectivity" REAL /* Subjectivity score of the review */,
  "polarity" REAL /* Polarity score of the review */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment derived from the review text */,
  "sentiment_analysis" TEXT /* Detailed sentiment analysis of the review */,
  "topic_modeling" TEXT /* Identifies the topics discussed in the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_statistics_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the review source (e.g., Amazon, Walmart) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the review source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* The type of source (e.g., e-commerce website, blog, social media) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* The date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review related to the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, helpful) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "parent_category" TEXT /* Parent category for hierarchical categorization */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* The official website of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for product-category association */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "is_primary_category" INTEGER /* Indicates if this category is the primary category for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_brands" (
  "product_brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for product-brand association */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_brands_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_brands_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_sources" (
  "review_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for review-source association */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* The date the review was imported from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_sources_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)
